scenarios.name: Taiwan Earthquake
scenarios.text: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake strikes Hsinchu, Taiwan. TSMC reports fab damage. Production suspended indefinitely.

scenarios.name: Port Strike
scenarios.text: Dockworkers strike at Port of Los Angeles. All container operations halted. No resolution timeline given.

scenarios.name: Sanctions
scenarios.text: US Treasury imposes new sanctions on Chinese semiconductor manufacturers effective immediately.
